issue.title: 10.com.au

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://10.com.au/race-across-the-world](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Frace-across-the-world) ### Comment > When I enable the AdBlock on 10Play, I'm met with this ''Unexpected Error" which prevents the videos from playing. Also, when I turn off AdBlock I have no issue playing videos which leads me to believe that it isn't something external causing the issue. This problem is the same for all videos on the site. I've also ensured my VPN is turned off as that can sometimes cause issues. > > Hopefully it can be fixed and thankyou for the otherwise highly effective online tool! :) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/f417y0ea6g8o4oc08sgggs88k0ccw8gk8xndhzbyhw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.1.31 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | 2026-04-13T08:00:41 Tracking protection: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Shazam` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.1.31&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.10&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2026-04-13T08%3A00%3A41)

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://10.com.au/a-league](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Fa-league) ### Comment > I have also captured HAR file. ``` Username: @TesterMan247 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2raou3iabpa8o4swk4wowc8wk8ssocsghpdimmeqeg.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/k7k6pyjhbk0wc4k448kskwsw0o4o8088orqpw8pekw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.6 (5267) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.22000.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List

**Other:**
AdGuard Experimental filter Custom filters: | `User rules (url: none)`,
`NoCoin Filter List (url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hoshsadiq/adblock-nocoin-list/master/nocoin.txt)` AdGuard driver: | WFP Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled Referrer: | [https://10.com.au/tv-guide](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Ftv-guide) ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.6+%285267%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.22000.0&browser=chrome&filters=2.3.5.11.18.19.20.21.207&custom_filters=User+rules+%28url%3A+none%29%2CNoCoin+Filter+List+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fhoshsadiq%2Fadblock-nocoin-list%2Fmaster%2Fnocoin.txt%29&dns_servers=System&userscripts=AdGuard+Extra+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fadguard-extra%2F1.0%2Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%2C%0AAdGuard+Popup+Blocker+%28url%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fpopup-blocker%2F2.5%2Fpopupblocker.user.js%29&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=true&stealth.location=true&stealth.flash=true&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=true&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=true&stealth.disable_windows_defender=true&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&referrer=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Ftv-guide&win.wfp=true&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=0&dns.fallback_mode=System&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)
